description: Junior in spring with a 5-school reach-and-target list mixing T20s and UCs.
business_rationale: Validates the most common journey for our highest-engagement users: a junior actively building their college list. Confirms that mixing top-tier reaches with UC schools produces a coherent personalized roadmap, including the UC group-application treatment that handles California schools as a single application bundle.
tests: Resolver picks junior_spring template from graduation_year=2027 + spring
5 colleges added via /add-to-list (3 UCs trigger UC group treatment downstream)
Final teardown wipes the test user back to empty
